questionHtml: Find the bearing that Jacob must take to point C.
markschemeHtml:
B A ∧ ⁡ C = 48.267 (seen anywhere)      A1

valid approach to find correct bearing      (M1)

eg  48.267 + 35

bearing = 83.3° (accept 083°)      A1

[3 marks]
